short_description: Loads spectroscopic and response data from files
long_description:
This step loads your calibration dataset including spectroscopic data (X), response variables (Y), and optional metadata.

Input Data Components:
- X Data (Spectra): Main spectroscopic measurements (required)
- Y Data (Responses): Target/dependent variables (optional)
- Variable Labels: Wavelengths, frequencies, or variable names (optional)
- Sample Labels: Sample IDs or identifiers (optional)

Data Formats:
- CSV files with configurable delimiters (comma, tabs, spaces)
- Matrix format: samples (rows) x variables (columns)
- Vector formats for specialized data types
- Support for multiple files via file selection

Configuration:
- Specify delimiter type for your files
- Set number of header rows to skip
- Choose appropriate data type structure
- Transpose if needed (samples in columns instead of rows)

The loaded data becomes input for preprocessing and validation steps.

layout.name: d_specs_headlines
layout.label: Number of Header Rows
layout.tooltip: Number of rows to skip at the beginning of each file

layout.name: d_specs_type
layout.label: Data Type
layout.tooltip: Structure of data: matrix (samples × variables) or vector formats

layout.name: d_specs_dimensions
layout.label: Data Dimensions
layout.tooltip: Specify dimensions for reshaping superior-order data (e.g., '100,500,10')
